requirements.summary: Verify frontend build configuration and deployment readiness for retry attempt without modifying any code or configuration files
acceptanceCriteria: The deployment completes successfully without errors
The frontend application loads correctly in the browser
Admin authentication functionality works as expected after deployment

file_operations.description: Verify application entry point configuration is correct for deployment. No code changes required - this is a validation step to ensure the existing setup matches deployment requirements.

Verify routing and authentication flow configuration is correct. No code changes required - this is a validation step to ensure admin authentication and routing are properly configured for deployment.
